title: ballota acuta var. intermedia
intro: Ballota acuta var. intermedia, also known as the upright bugle, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Ballota acuta var. intermedia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
